name: orbitguard
description: Space sustainability analyzer with a dashboard, launch impact simulator, and local API.

scripts.check: node --check server.mjs && node --check scripts/update-data.mjs && node --check scripts/generate-assets.mjs && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/engines/orbitguard-core.js && find api -name '*.js' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
